The question is asking to determine how long Tamera Mowry has been doing television. To find out, we need to sort the data based on the "year" column in the order of "small to large" using the f_sort_column(year) operation. This will allow us to see the earliest and latest years of her television appearances and calculate the duration.

Tamera Mowry's television career started in 1991 with the show "Flesh'n Blood" and has continued through various roles up to at least 2014. To calculate the duration, we subtract the starting year (1991) from the latest year mentioned (2014). Therefore, Tamera Mowry has been doing television for 23 years.
